title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Newgen Software

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Newgen Software
jsonLd.description:
Join the Newgen Software family as a Frontend Developer in Kanpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Newgen Software:
Newgen Software is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Newgen Software!
